store_headline: WordPress Agency Theme with Built-In Job Board
store_subheadline: Build your agency site with portfolio, job listings, and a shop — all without a developer.
features: Creative digital agency-focused design and layouts
Portfolio showcase system for projects and case studies
Job posting and career management system
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation
Elementor page builder with agency-specific elements
WooCommerce integration for digital products and services
Variation swatches for service options and packages
Contact forms for client inquiries and project requests
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
One-click demo import with complete agency website setups
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
selling_points: The only WolfThemes agency theme with a native job board for clients and talent
Arched window and botanical motif identity with yellow/green hand-drawn accents — boutique studio aesthetic over corporate uniformity
Elementor-powered for drag-and-drop flexibility boutique studios need to iterate without a developer
WooCommerce integration lets agencies sell service packages, digital products, or retainer agreements from their portfolio site
Portfolio system built for case studies and project showcases — not just image grids
Wolf Jobs plugin creates dedicated careers pages with listings — no third-party job board subscription needed
Targets personality-first boutique studios that want character over scale — distinct from more corporate agency themes
key_benefits: Build a client-attracting agency website with portfolio, job listings, and a shop
Recruit top creative talent with a native job board
Showcase portfolio and case studies with layouts designed for studios and agencies
Sell service packages and digital products through WooCommerce
Establish boutique studio identity with architectural motifs and hand-drawn accents
Convert visitors into clients with Elementor service pages and portfolio case studies
Launch a creative agency presence that signals personality, not off-the-shelf professionalism
design_features: Portfolio and case study showcase options
Service page layouts with package options
Team member profiles and job listing pages
Multiple header styles with professional aesthetics
